title: dflow.template.json
description: Deploy manifest v1 for dFlow starter templates (dflow-sh/starters).

schemaVersion.description: Manifest format version. v1 documents use the value "1".

id.description: Stable template id; must match starters/<category>/<kebab-id>/ (e.g. frontend/react-vite).

displayName.description: Human-readable name for catalogs and docs.

category.description: Layout category; must match the first segment of id and the starters path.

framework.description: Primary framework or runtime surface (e.g. Vite, FastAPI, Spring Boot).

runtime.description: Optional coarse runtime hint for platform and CI.

installCommand.description: Command or argv to install dependencies.

buildCommand.description: Command or argv to produce build artifacts; may be empty for interpreted-only templates.

startCommand.description: Command or argv to run the app (dev or production server as documented in the starter README).

port.description: Primary listen port for the running service.

type.description: Health check mechanism; v1 only defines HTTP GET.

path.description: URL path for the health check (e.g. /health).

staticDir.description: Relative path to static assets root (e.g. SPAs after build).

name.description: Environment variable name only; never store secret values in the manifest.

description.description: What the variable is for (no values or secret material).

env.description: Declared environment variables (names and semantics only).

tags.description: Free-form labels for search and grouping.

support.description: Maintenance and CI tier for this starter.

buildCommand.description: String (including empty) or array of non-empty strings (empty array allowed).
